discussion_comments.comment_body: Add some variations to the syntax used inside the `@{ }` block, to ensure robustness.
Hey @sidharthv96 , I have refactored these test cases here in https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/pull/6704/commits/d86e46b705c2a1d4c4853fbf953e56dd6e6b44a6

**issue(not sure if blocking or not)**: I don't know about this.

I feel like this might make it harder to debug issues where the font fails to load.

Maybe just doing:

```suggestion
  await loadFontAwesomeCSS();
  await Promise.all(Array.from(document.fonts, (font) => font.load()));
```

That way we get a JavaScript error when it fails to load and Cypress fails?

I don't know. @sidharthv96 and @saurabhg772244, what are your thoughts?
